extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity. For criminal proceedings against the listed entities, I counted Nil for the Company, directors and promoters, Nil for subsidiaries, and 1 against KMP/Senior Management, excluding all “By” rows; statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company, promoters and subsidiaries total 3, while tax proceedings against the Company and subsidiaries total 3 + 3 = 6, excluding promoter-personal tax matters and all “By” rows. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company and subsidiaries is stated in the table as ₹35.12 million and ₹0.35 million, respectively; their sum is ₹35.47 million, converted to ₹3.547 crore at ₹10 million per crore. No contingent-liabilities table or total is disclosed in the provided risk section. Company-wide customer concentration is 34.27% for the top five and 45.24% for the top ten in Fiscal 2024, based on revenue from operations; these are the latest full-fiscal figures, rather than the nine-month figures. Litigation amounts and financial tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
